title: cypholophus montanus
intro: Cypholophus montanus, also known as mountain cypholophus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Verbenaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cypholophus montanus include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
